message:
Apply clippy fixes: clone_from, method references, immutable writer refs, flattened conditionals

- pool.rs: Move SampledMessage struct to module scope (fixes clippy::too_many_lines), add allow attribute
- reconstruct.rs: Use serde_json::Value::as_i64 method reference instead of closure
- search_service.rs: Use clone_from() instead of .clone() for string field assignment; iterate Vec instead of hashing it wholesale for deterministic hashing
- search_v3.rs: Use map_or instead of map().unwrap_or(); pass &writer instead of &mut writer (Tantivy IndexWriter doesn't need mut); flatten nested if-let with additional condition; use struct clone instead of field-by-field copy for MessageStats

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
